name: Akarius
description: Bombard legions of enemies with target seeking rockets. These dual launchers reload faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. Rockets arm after reaching a safe distance.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Bombard legions of enemies with target seeking rockets. These dual launchers reload faster while sprinting, even more so in Gauss’ hands. Rockets arm after reaching a safe distance.

components.name: Hexenon
components.description:
A reagent commonly used to produce highly combustible fuel.

Location: Jupiter

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Polymer Bundle
components.description:
A hard, thermoplastic casing. Manufactured by Corpus.

Location: Mercury, Venus, and Uranus

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the missing explosion sound FX on the Akarius’ projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing explosion sound on Akarius projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Akarius explosion FX defaulting to its original blue color when not Hosting. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1283536-akarius-explosion-fx-color-does-not-follow-energy-color-if-you-are-not-host/

patchlogs.name: Update 30.7: Nidus Prime & Plague Star
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Cedo, Cyanex and Akarius causing a parried reaction (knock back) versus certain enemies.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Akarius’ projectiles detonating on Volt’s Electric Shield instead of passing through it.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Akarius dealing self-damage with multishot projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Removed Akarius arming distance from projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Akarius’ projectiles not homing onto enemies for Clients, as reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1125338-akarius-homing/

patchlogs.name: TennoGen & Nightwave Episode 5: Hotfix 25.7.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Akarius not homing in on enemies when playing as a Client.

patchlogs.name: Prime Vault: Hotfix 25.7.4 + 25.7.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Akarius ammo parts not hiding with invisible frames (Loki, Ivara, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.7.2 + 25.7.2.1
patchlogs.additions: Fixed Akarius FX particles perpetually lingering, thus also affecting performance.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Accelerate past the redline with Gauss. This collection includes the Gauss Warframe, Gauss Mag Helmet, Acceltra rapid-fire rocket launcher, and Akarius secondary rocket launchers.
